title: Application Security Labs
summary: Hands-on application security work covering SQL injection, XSS, CSRF, fuzzing, Burp Suite workflows, exploit validation, and defensive explanation.

logs.title: Active reconnaissance and exploitation lab work
logs.details: Used Burp Suite, Docker, and fuzzing tooling to practice application discovery, request analysis, and controlled exploitation workflows.

logs.title: SQL injection lab reference established
